tracks.title: Rewst & n8n Reliability
tracks.focus: Make playbooks resilient with approvals, retries, and connector contract tests.
items: Harden error handling and idempotency across high-traffic automations.
Design failure detection in workflows, use AI to classify success/failure, auto-create support tickets for failures, and extend coverage to internal and external user services.

certifications.title: Clean Automation Certified: Automation Engineer (Rewst, Jan 2025)
CCNA: Enterprise Networking, Security, and Automation (Jul 2022)

experiments: Evaluating AI agent CLI workflows for safe automation handoffs, local task execution, and MSP workflow augmentation.
Testing agent-assisted reliability checks for n8n and Rewst workflows before moving patterns into reusable runbooks.
Prototyping controlled n8n-to-agent handoffs for SSH-based automation in local and lab environments.
Exploring MSP triggers that can hand off well-scoped tasks to AI agents end-to-end with approvals and audit trails.

roadmap.impact: Build a lightweight family site for updates and shared resources, using it as a practical Next.js/TypeScript content and deployment exercise rather than a primary professional project.
Discover, plan, and implement a self-hostable, open-source stack (free-tier friendly) for home automation/CCTV using Frigate NVR and local AI surveillance.
